sglang.title: [feat] support minimum token load balance in dp attention
sglang.author: WANG-GH
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation & Modifications
When DP attention is enabled, the system decides which DP group to dispatch a request to based on the current load of each DP group.
The load data from all DP groups is gathered once to the TP0 node, where TP0 interacts with the dispatcher via shared memory to share the lo

sglang.title: Do layernorm before allgather for DP attention
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
By doing layernorm before all-gather, we operate on 1/DPth of the tokens reducing the computation time.
Modifications
Perform layernorm before DP gather in layer communicator.
Currently only enabled when DP==TP.
Accuracy Test
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path nvidia/DeepSeek-R1

Motivation

During colocated RL, we will use /release_memory_occupation to release all GPU allocations within model init, and we should not create GPU tensors that cannot be loaded through weight_loader.
This PR moves the creation of self.expert_map_gpu to forward and make sure self.expert_map_cpu i

sglang.title: use fp32 for e_score_correction_bias in GLM-4.5
sglang.author: zRzRzRzRzRzRzR
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Force e_score_correction_bias to FP32 instead of using the model's own dtype. This is to maintain consistency with what was passed during training.

sglang.title: Fix triton kernels topk with keyword arguments
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For the triton kernels topk routing function, the meaning of sm_first is not exactly the same as renormalize. Use keyword arguments to avoid confusion and unknown bugs.

If sm_first = True, the softmax will before the topk, so the result can be unnormalized before sort. renormalize is not

vllm.title: Add tree attention backend for v1 (part 1)
vllm.author: TheEpicDolphin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add support for tree attention v1 backend. Tree attention is used in EAGLE speculative decoding by the target model to validate a set of draft tokens. Draft tokens only attend to ancestor tokens, and so attention bias must be used to omit attention between non-descendant tokens. To suppor th

vllm.title: [refactor] improve ConstantList exception specificity
vllm.author: skyloevil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Replace generic Exception with TypeError for all mutating operations in ConstantList class. This provides more precise error semantics as these operations attempt to modify an immutable data structure, which is fundamentally a type compatibility issue.
Changes:

append, extend, insert, pop, remove,

vllm.title: Remove index_put from MM embeddings merging
vllm.author: chenxi-yang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Previously, merge_multimodal_embeddings used inputs_embeds[is_multimodal]=flattened to merge the MM embeddings. This index_put operations calls non_zero in pytorch, which forces an additional D2H shape check sync point.
This diff uses masked_scatter to bypass the D2H point. The latency chan
